response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, particularly in high-scale environments (Google, Meta). However, his background lacks explicit evidence of executive leadership in AI-driven fintech, multi-agent systems in production, or scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure at Google and open-source event-driven platforms are promising but not directly aligned with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Proven experience in high-scale distributed systems and event-driven architectures at Google and Meta.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and developer tooling.
Strong technical breadth across full-stack, backend, and real-time systems, with fintech-adjacent exposure (e.g., RIDE Capital).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams to 30+ people.
Lacks demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments.
Fintech expertise is limited to investment platforms (RIDE Capital) rather than core infrastructure (credit systems, risk modeling).
